title: Archive Mirror
excerpt: A physical-digital collaboration with painter Santiago Pani — faces from dreams, surfacing and dissolving in light.
description:
A collaboration with the Mexican painter Santiago Pani. Archive Mirror brings Santiago's expressionist faces — anonymous characters glimpsed in dreams and the subconscious, hovering at the threshold where recognition fades into abstraction — together with my own work in light and point-cloud data.

On a large luminous panel the faces surface, shift and dissolve, staged within the gothic architecture of a historic church. The work sits between control and chaos, line and stain, the remembered and the imagined. First shown as a try-out in 2025.
credits: Painting: Santiago Pani. Documentary: Guillaume Versteeg.
